record.field: PO {{ object.rk_po_number or object.name }} — {{ object.rk_institution_id.name }} औ Please arrange supply

Dear Team,

Please find below the Purchase Order details for your reference and action.

Institution {{ object.rk_institution_id.name }}
PO Number {{ object.rk_po_number or object.name }}
PO Approval Date {{ object.rk_po_approval_date or '' }}
RC Number {{ object.rk_rc_number or '' }}
Supply Due Date {{ object.rk_supply_due_date or 'To be calculated from acceptance date' }}
Total PO Value ₹ {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_total) }}
Destination {{ object.rk_institution_id.address or object.rk_institution_id.cds_code or '' }}

Items Ordered:

% for line in object.order_line: % endfor
Product Qty Unit Rate (₹) Total (₹)
{{ line.product_id.name }} {% if line.rk_brand_name %}({{ line.rk_brand_name }}){% endif %} {{ line.product_qty }} {{ line.product_uom.name }} {{ '{:,.4f}'.format(line.price_unit) }} {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(line.price_subtotal) }}

Important ESI Supply Conditions:

  • Please confirm acceptance of this PO within 7 days of receipt.
  • Supply to be completed within 42 days from acceptance date.
  • Penalty: 2% of PO value per week of delay (max 10% of PO value).
  • MRP must be masked/blocked on all outer cartons and individual strips/bottles.
  • Each item must be stamped: "ESI supply not for sale".
  • Batch number, expiry date, manufacturing date must be mentioned on the invoice.
  • Drug analysis report (batch-wise) to be uploaded on eAushadhi portal.
  • Supply only to destination: {{ object.rk_institution_id.cds_code or object.rk_institution_id.name }}.

Please send us the following on dispatch:

  1. LR / GR Number and Transporter name
  2. Batch Number, Manufacturing Date, Expiry Date
  3. Quantity dispatched
  4. Copy of invoice
  5. Drug analysis report for the batch

For any queries, please contact us immediately.

Regards,
{{ user.name }}
Radhekrishn Biotech
Tarnaka, Secunderabad, Telangana
GST: 36AGNPT7076N1ZB
URGENT: Supply Overdue — PO {{ object.rk_po_number }} — {{ object.rk_institution_id.name }}

URGENT — Supply is overdue by {{ object.rk_delay_days }} days

Dear Team,

This is an urgent reminder that the supply against the below PO is overdue by {{ object.rk_delay_days }} days ({{ object.rk_delay_weeks }} week(s)).

PO Number {{ object.rk_po_number }}
Institution {{ object.rk_institution_id.name }}
Supply Due Date {{ object.rk_supply_due_date }}
Delay {{ object.rk_delay_days }} days ({{ object.rk_delay_weeks }} week(s))
Penalty Accrued ₹ {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(object.rk_supply_penalty_amount) }} ({{ '{:.1f}'.format(object.rk_supply_penalty_pct) }}% of PO value)
Extended Deadline {{ object.rk_supply_extended_due_date }} (last date for supply)
PO Value ₹ {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(object.amount_total) }}

Action required immediately:

  • Dispatch the material and send LR number today.
  • If supply cannot be executed, please communicate immediately to obtain extension approval from the institution's Nodal Officer.
  • Extension requires prior sanction from the Nodal Officer — without approval, full penalty applies.
  • Non-supply beyond extended deadline may result in risk purchase at your expense and debarment from future rate contracts.

Please respond to this email with your dispatch plan urgently.

Regards,
{{ user.name }}
Radhekrishn Biotech
Claim Interest Notice — PO {{ object.rk_po_number }} — Payment Overdue by {{ object.rk_claim_overdue_weeks }} Week(s)

To,
The Nodal Officer,
{{ object.rk_institution_id.name }}
{% if object.rk_institution_id.cds_code %}{{ object.rk_institution_id.cds_code }}{% endif %}

Sub: Claim interest on delayed payment — PO No. {{ object.rk_po_number }} — reg.

Ref: PO Approval Date: {{ object.rk_po_approval_date }}, QC Clearance Date: {{ object.rk_qc_date or 'N/A' }}

Dear Sir/Madam,

This is to bring to your kind attention that the payment against the below Purchase Order is overdue by {{ object.rk_claim_overdue_weeks }} week(3s) beyond the agreed claim free period of { { object.rk_rc_agreement_id.claim_free_days if object.rk_rc_agreement_id else 90 }} days.

PO Number {{ object.rk_po_number }}
RC Number {{ object.rk_rc_number }}
QC Clearance Date {{ object.rk_qc_date or 'N/A' }}
Days Elapsed Since QC {{ object.rk_claim_days_elapsed }} days
Claim Free Period {{ object.rk_rc_agreement_id.claim_free_days if object.rk_rc_agreement_id else 90 }} days
Overdue Weeks {{ object.rk_claim_overdue_weeks }} week(s)
Bill Amount ₹ {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(object.rk_gross_amount_received or object.amount_total) }}
Claim Interest Rate {{ object.rk_rc_agreement_id.claim_penalty_percent_per_week if object.rk_rc_agreement_id else '0.5' }}% per week
Claim Interest Accrued ₹ {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(object.rk_claim_interest_amount) }}

Kindly arrange to release the payment along with the applicable claim interest at the earliest. A formal debit note for the claim interest will be raised separately.

Thanking you,

Yours faithfully,
{{ user.name }}
Radhekrishn Biotech
Tarnaka, Secunderabad, Telangana — 500017
GST: 36AGNPT7076N1ZB
